display.purpose: Staff-facing page titles and hero statements.

body.purpose: Readable office copy, labels, and reservation details.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Buttons, navigation, tabs, and small feedback transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary staff action such as save, approve, or new reservation.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; padding: 13px 22px; border-radius: 10px; border: 2px solid #0B4A6F; background: #0B4A6F; color: #FFFFFF; font: 600 16px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms ease-out, border-color 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #083A57; border-color: #083A57; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #DCEAF2; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.css: .ds-pill-approved { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 28px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; background: #DEF0E3; color: #1F7A43; font: 600 13px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Office Card
components.description: Default bordered paper surface for forms, summaries, and tables.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2937; border: 1px solid #DCD6C7; border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 400 26px/1.1 Instrument Serif, Georgia, serif; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #6B7280; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Large staff-readable input for reservation forms.
components.css: .ds-input { min-height: 48px; width: 100%; padding: 13px 14px; border: 2px solid #DCD6C7; border-radius: 10px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2937; font: 400 17px/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0B4A6F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #DCEAF2; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Row
components.css: .ds-nav-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 44px 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 14px; width: 100%; min-height: 68px; padding: 14px 16px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: #1F2937; text-align: left; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms ease-out, border-color 120ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-row:hover { background: #F0ECE3; } .ds-nav-row-active { background: #EFF5F8; border-color: #DCEAF2; color: #0B4A6F; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #0B4A6F; color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 700; } .ds-nav-row strong { display: block; font-size: 16px; } .ds-nav-row small { display: block; margin-top: 2px; color: #6B7280; font-size: 13px; }

narrative.overview: This system should feel like a well-organized office ledger translated into a modern screen: warm paper surfaces, clear blue official actions, large readable controls, and labels that speak to staff instead of software specialists.
keyCharacteristics: Warm office-paper surfaces with civic blue as the primary action color.
17px body text and 48px minimum standard controls for staff readability.
Persistent sidebar navigation with large labeled targets.
Status colors paired with text labels for reservation state.
Short, functional motion only for hover, focus, dialogs, and confirmations.

rules.name: The Blue Means Action Rule
rules.body: Civic Blue is reserved for primary intent, active navigation, and confirmed selected states. Do not spend it on decoration.

rules.name: The Status Must Read Rule
rules.body: Never rely on color alone for pending, approved, completed, missed, danger, or warning. Pair every status color with a word, icon, or both.

rules.name: The Staff Can Read It Rule
rules.body: Do not drop working text below 14px. Primary forms, cards, and navigation should stay at 16px or larger; the staff-friendly baseline is 17px.

rules.name: The Border First Rule
rules.body: Use borders and tonal layers for normal structure. Use shadows only when the surface floats, moves, or blocks the page.

dos: Do keep the product offline-first and staff-mediated in language and workflow.
Do use large target sizes for staff actions: 48px minimum, 64px for major task buttons.
Do pair English labels with Filipino helper text when it reduces confusion.
Do keep reservation status visible in lists, calendars, dialogs, and reports.
Do use warm paper backgrounds and civic blue primary actions consistently.
donts: Don't make it look like a public startup landing page.
Don't make it look like a sports entertainment app.
Don't use a dark command-center dashboard as the default staff experience.
Don't use tiny admin-table typography for primary workflows.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism, neon gradients, or hidden controls.
Don't imply residents can reserve remotely unless that workflow is intentionally added.
